<!-- Keep PRs small and focused: one issue → one PR. -->

## What & why

<!-- One or two lines. Link the issue it resolves. -->

Fixes #

## How it was verified

<!-- The important part: a test that was RED before and is GREEN now. -->

- [ ] Added/updated a test that fails without this change
- [ ] `npm run check` passes (typecheck + tests + coverage thresholds)
- [ ] `npm run bundle:validate` passes (marketplace manifest still valid)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npx changeset`) — patch for fixes, minor for features
- [ ] Updated the READMEs (en / pt-BR / es) if behavior or config changed

## Notes

<!-- Breaking changes, follow-ups, anything a reviewer should know. -->
